metadata.reference: O. C. Karaman, G. N. Naidu, A. R. Bowman, E. N. Dayi, G. Tagliabue. Decoupling optical and thermal dynamics in dielectric metasurfaces for self-encoded photonic control. Laser Photonics Rev., e01014 (2025) (Numerical data kindly provided by Omer Can Karaman)
metadata.comments: Amorphous silicon (a-Si), 220 °C. 100 nm film on fused silica substrate.
